name: alex-cognitive-architecture
description: Your cognitive learning partner — installs a living brain of skills, instructions, and prompts that makes GitHub Copilot dramatically smarter in any project.

alex.workspace.protectedMode.description: When enabled, prevents brain operations that modify workspace files. Auto-enabled for Master Alex.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Alex
walkthroughs.description: Install the cognitive brain, explore the sidebar, and start collaborating with your AI learning partner.

steps.title: Install Brain Files
steps.description:
Install the cognitive architecture into your workspace. This adds skills, instructions, and prompts that supercharge GitHub Copilot.

[Install Brain](command:alex.updateBrain)

steps.title: Explore the Sidebar
steps.description: Click the Alex icon in the Activity Bar to see brain status, quick actions, and documentation links.

steps.title: Chat with Alex
steps.description:
Open GitHub Copilot Chat and start a conversation. Alex's brain files automatically enhance every response.

[Open Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)

steps.title: Run a Dream Session
steps.description:
Consolidate knowledge and maintain architecture health through Alex's dream state.

[Start Dream](command:alex.dream)

steps.title: Documentation and Resources
steps.description:
Read the user guide, FAQ, and architecture docs.

[Open Documentation](command:alex.openDocs)

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run clean && npm run build:check && npm run build -- --production
